items.title: The age of Agentic Commerce has arrived. Consensus 2026 is where you can experience it IRL
items.summary: AI agents are already transacting. The question now is what kind of financial infrastructure they run on -and who builds it.

items.title: Stablecoin Giant Tether Reveals Plans for Modular Bitcoin Mining Hardware
items.summary: Leading stablecoin issuer Tether has teamed with Canaan and ACME Swisstech to develop customizable, upgradable Bitcoin mining rigs.

items.title: Polymarket reportedly seeking CFTC approval to reopen main exchange to U.S. traders
items.summary: If approved, the move would help Polymarket compete with Kalshi in the U.S., and bring more event-trading activity under CFTC regulatory oversight.

items.title: Riot extends $200 million Coinbase credit facility, and bitcoin weakness could mean more sales
items.summary: The miner locked in fixed borrowing costs and extended maturity, but a shrinking BTC treasury and loan-to-value triggers leave little room for error if prices slide.

items.title: Microsoft says legacy banks are hitting a breaking point as AI takes over the heavy lifting
items.summary: Microsoft and Chainalysis executives warned that as AI agents begin managing transactions at scale, the financial industry must overhaul its legacy infrastructure to prioritize machine identity and trust.

items.title: Bitcoin price hits one-week low as $100 oil sparks fresh Asia crisis fears
items.summary: Bitcoin price downside returned to send BTC to one-week lows thanks to renewed concerns over global oil supplies focused on the Strait of Hormuz blockade.

items.title: Inside Trump’s Meme Coin Bash: Foreign Guests, Iran War Riffs, and Mar-a-Lago Charm
items.summary: The president discussed policy, technology, and war with his top meme coin holders on Saturday at a private Mar-a-Lago gathering.

items.title: BitMart x EAT Trade-to-Feed Competition to Pay Out $4.4M USDT to Traders in May 2026
items.summary: The 30-day Trade-to-Feed competition marks BitMart's 8th anniversary and the exchange's strategic listing of EAT, the first cause coin.

items.title: A crypto coalition releases technical proposal to save Aave users from a massive token exploit

items.title: 'Crypto Godfather' says bitcoin has not reached its bottom and a new all-time high is off the table for 2026
items.summary: The early bitcoin investor and author of Bitcoin Supercycle says bitcoin needs to drop to about $57,000 sometime in October before beginning its ascent. A market analyst disagrees.

items.title: AML crackdown eclipses securities enforcement as crypto’s top regulatory risk: Report

items.title: Not a theft, but a statement: Inside the Bitcoin proposal to reassign Satoshi-linked coins
